message:
refactor(viz): normalize PhageRepository import paths

Changes imports from:
  import type { PhageRepository } from '@phage-explorer/db-runtime';
To:
  import type { PhageRepository } from '../db';

**Why This Change:**

The @phage-explorer/db-runtime package is an internal implementation detail
that re-exports types from the web package's db module. Using the local
import:

1. Avoids circular dependency issues during builds
2. Reduces bundle size by not pulling in the full db-runtime package
3. Makes the import graph cleaner and easier to understand
4. Follows the pattern used elsewhere in the visualization module

**Files Changed:**
- VisualizationPreview.tsx
- rendererHost.ts
- repoSequenceSource.ts
- useRendererHost.ts

Also removed trailing blank lines for consistent file formatting.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
